reviews.review_description: After what seem to be over an hour of installing 29 updates finally got to the sign up page only to be unable to add mobile number. Absolute waste of time and space. Very disappointed. Would have given zero stars, but was not able to do that. Don't waste your time uploading this app. It doesn't work

after a very long time waiting for 29 updates I get to screen where it wants be to enter mobile number, but when entered the submit button does nothing. Tried resetting app and headset, still stuck.🤬👎 couple hours wasted

This is actually super helpful! The slicer tool and explode view made it way easier to see how organs are layered. Microanatomy was detailed too. Few UI things confused me at first but got used to it fast. Def worth using if ur starting out in med school.

Using AnatomyXR has completely changed the way I study the human body. The 3D models are highly detailed and easy to interact with. Instead of spending hours searching through videos or diagrams online, now I can explore every part of the body in minutes. It’s perfect for both beginners and advanced learners. The ability to rotate and zoom into every organ or muscle makes learning more engaging and effective.

I really enjoyed using anatomyxr to view 3d models of thr human body. Usually i would look up videos and images on the web but that used to take more time and i would find it hard to see everything in 3d. With anatomyxr its so much easier to see each and every angle of the human body with just a few clicks.

i've been using this app for the past few days and have been loving it. really liked the way i can virtually interact with the 3d models. i also appreciate the way i can get to know the various clinical conditions associated with each segment. i look forward to future updates.

Love how we can visualize the entire human body with just a few clicks. Very helpful for someone looking to understand human anatomy. Closest thing to holding a real human body organ. Highly recommended.

CRAZY GOOD!!!

APP IS SO GOOD WHEN I NEED TO LOOK UP SOME ORGAN. 3D MODELS ARE SO MUCB BETTER THAN JUST A PHOTOGRAPH. I LIKE HOLDING ONTO AN ORGAN VIRTUALLY. HAND GESTURES ARE PRETTY  COOL AS WELL.
